EMBERTAMER

The crown of the first king still burns
beyond four wild roads and four quiet towns.
Tame what the dark left behind. Take the crown.
WASD/←↑↓→ move & navigate   Z/ENTER confirm   X back
Q potion   M mute   swipe + d-pad on touch
Who walks into the ash?
A voice from below:
"Choose the one who walks with you."
